name: Vegetarian Posole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the onions and garlic in a little oil.
2. Add the vegetables to the pan with the browning onions and garlic.
3. Add the tomatoes and cook until the vegetables start to soften (about 10-15 minutes).
4. Add the seasonings: salt, cumin, oregano, and black pepper to taste.
5. Add the hominy.
6. Cook until all vegetables and the hominy are soft (another 10-15 minutes).
